properties.comment: English language file for texjavahelpmk (in addition to texparserlib-en.xml) https://github.com/nlct/texjavahelp GPL-3.0 Nicola Talbot
properties.entry: I we you he she it they my our your his her its their mine ours yours his hers its theirs me us him her them a an the and but or nor as because since so there here where when which why how now such whoever however wherever in of with for by from at on to not no be am are is was were this that may should would ought must can use used using has have
{0} <charset> Set the character encoding to <charset> for the output files.
{0} <directory> Save output images in <directory> (relative to the output directory).
{0} <LaTeX> Use <LaTeX> code for the preamble of files used to generate images on-the-fly.
{0} <file> Use the LaTeX code provided in <file> for the preamble of files used to generate images on-the-fly.
{0} <application> Use <application> to convert PDF files to PNG or JPEG. (Default: {1})
{0} <css> Add <css> code to CSS style sheet.
{0} <file> Add CSS code provided in <file> to style sheet.
{0} <html> Add <html> code to the start of the HTML body.
{0} <file> Add HTML code provided in <file> to the start of the HTML body.
{0} <html> Add <html> code to the end of the HTML body.
{0} <file> Add HTML code provided in <file> to the end of the HTML body.
{0} Add breadcrumb trail to the start of the HTML body.
{0} Use HTML entities for non-ASCII characters.
{0} <file> Add HTML code provided in <file> to HTML header.
{0} Set the extension for HTML files (default: html).
{0} <name> Encapsulate minitoc in div with given class name.
{0} <id> Encapsulate minitoc in div with given id.
{0} <basename> Use <basename> for the root file name (without the extension). Default: basename of the input file.
{0} <html> Add <html> code to the start of the HTML body for just the root page.
{0} <html> Add <html> code to the end of the HTML body for just the root page.
{0} Use Unicode superscripts or subscripts where available.
No aux data found! The document must be fully compiled first to ensure all auxiliary files are present.
No current node. The auxiliary files may be missing or not up-to-date.
No current node. Division data has been disabled. Use {0} with a value > 0
No division data. The auxiliary files may be missing or not up-to-date or sectioning units may be missing a label.
Unexpected \ found in kpsewhich({0}). A command may not have been properly expanded.
Only one input file and output directory permitted
